error_analysis.unparseable_pattern: Model outputs verbose explanations for NO_DEFAULT cases instead of clean labels

notes: 67 of 100 test outputs were unparseable (model gave explanations instead of labels). Metrics calculated on 33 parseable outputs. All parseable outputs were DEFAULT predictions - model learned to be concise for DEFAULT, verbose for NO_DEFAULT. This is a common fine-tuning artifact that could be fixed with output formatting constraints.
